hero.subhead: HAVS is a business development practice for the Nordic construction industry. Led by David Hav, working across timber, roofing, cement, and other sustainable building systems.

triage.heading: Who do we work with?
triage.manufacturers_body: We open doors to the architects, contractors, and developers who specify your products — whether timber, roofing, cement, or other eco-friendly materials. Long-term relationships, real pipelines.
triage.architects_body: A direct line to producers of sustainable building materials — from CLT and glulam to green roofing systems and low-emission concrete — with the technical context to make specification straightforward.
triage.contractors_body: Access to the Nordic sustainable building supply chain and the people behind it. Tender support, supplier introductions, and project-stage advice.

practice.pullquote: A sustainable construction industry is built on relationships.
practice.body: HAVS works in the space between product and project. We introduce producers of eco-friendly building materials to architects who specify, contractors who build, and developers who commission. The result is fewer cold meetings, more qualified opportunities, and sustainable materials that end up in the right buildings.

partners.heading: Working with the Nordic construction industry.
partners.body: HAVS represents a selected network of sustainable building material producers across the Nordic region — from timber and roofing to cement and façade systems.

process.heading: How David works
process.step1_body: A first conversation to understand your products, projects, or specification needs.
process.step2_body: Targeted introductions to architects, contractors, or manufacturers in the right context.
process.step3_body: Curated meetings with decision-makers — specifiers, project managers, procurement.
process.step4_body: Continued involvement through tender, specification, and delivery.

about_snippet.heading: David Hav
about_snippet.body: David has spent his career in the Nordic construction industry, building the kind of long-term relationships that move eco-friendly products from catalogue to specification. HAVS is the practice he runs from Denmark, working across Sweden, Denmark, and Norway.

contact_band.heading: Start a conversation.
contact_band.body: Most projects begin with a thirty-minute call. There is no template — whether it is timber, roofing, cement, or something else entirely.

contact_page.heading: Start a conversation.
contact_page.success: Thank you — David will be in touch shortly.
contact_page.error_generic: Something went wrong. Try again or write directly to david@havs.dk.
